programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw blows a massive horn while Margie Cooper goes bananas in a hothouse at Chatsworth House. Paul gets excited about bus conductors while Margie sweetens the deal with a very peculiar honey separator.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper goes into hiding, Paul Laidlaw gets on his bike. Will Paul's 16th-century gun shoot down Margie's galloping zebra at the last auction of this Trip in Shrewsbury?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Catherine Southon start their Road Trip in Cambridge. Catherine falls for an 18th century silk tapestry and finds a delightful Victorian letter seal. Meanwhile, Raj springs for a Francis Flint print and silver candelabras.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Catherine Southon begin today's trip in Norwich. A detour has Raj learn about a quaint market town's unlikely connection to Tutankhamun. And Catherine hears about the region's ferocious warrior queen, the legendary Boudica.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon finds a propelling pencil while Raj Bisram discovers 19th-century Italian hatpins. Catherine learns how melons have helped save millions of lives while Raj meets an endangered horse with significant history in the area.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Raj Bisram head to the land of Bakewell Tarts and strong blue cheese. Catherine hopes 19th-century French Opera glasses will hit the right note, while Raj thinks tin-based Royal memorabilia will attract big bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon hopes to be top dog with two porcelain Staffordshire poodles, while Raj Bisram has pinned his hopes on a spinning globe. In what is possibly the closest contest ever seen on Antiques Road Trip, who will be crowned champ?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: New Road Tripper Tim Medhurst hits the road with veteran Christina Trevanion through a rainy southwest of England. Employing different tactics, Tim blows half his cash on a box of militaria while Christina opts for Japanese Satsuma.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: While Tim Medhurst goes has a lesson in fire-fighting on an historic boat, Christina Trevanion fancies a hard-boiled egg and some cheddar. Who'll make the biggest profit at auction in Exeter?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion impresses Tim Medhurst by reaching full throttle in the car and, while he scales a 500-foot cliff, she climbs a wardrobe. Will either of them reach dizzy heights at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Our antiques experts go equestrian in the New Forest. After an encounter with some wild ponies, Christina Trevanion turns farrier while Tim Medhurst buys a horse hoping to gallop after her.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Tim Medhurst's last chance to get the better of Christina Trevanion. Will a 400-year-old shilling be enough to do it in today's money? Or will Christina's rubies be worth a king's ransom?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw start hunting for treasure in the Sherwood Forest. Can Catherine's cold painted peacock attract higher bids that Paul's porcelain God of Mars?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw plus their sporty little roadster, browse around the River Severn. But who'll be victorious at that auction in Newport, Shropshire?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael presents his first Antiques Roadshow from the Victoria and Albert Museum in London. The experts uncover a treasure trove of unusual objects, including an original hand-written poem by WB Yeats, examples of Meissen, and a rare silver tobacco box.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A visit to Barnstaple in North Devon turns up an important enamel miniature by Henry Bone, a valuable collection of walking sticks, a World War I pilot's watch, a valuable painting from the Newlyn School, and a 19th-century native Canadian octopus bag.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit the Valley Leisure Centre in Biddulph, Staffordshire. Featured are a rare Wedgwood egg scrambler, a Constable sketch, an English repeater watch, a remarkable collection of ship's documents, and Queen Victoria's handkerchief.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Glamis Castle in Angus, Scotland. They find a posy ring with a grim story, a dining table used for resting a coffin on, diamond jewelry, 18th-century miniatures with musical connections, and the scrapbook of a WW1 pilot.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael introduces sequences from previous roadshows and recounts stories of the Queen Mother's early life at Glamis Castle. Featuring ivory figures, a pair of Chinese imperial bowls, a stone necklace, and a collection of handbag mirrors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Selby in North Yorkshire to examine an embroidered picture, a copy of Beatrix Potter's book The Fairy Caravan, two rare cornets, and a Masonic porcelain collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Wisbech in Cambridgeshire where they examine a vase covered in paint and a Martinware bird. There's also an impressive collection of royal invitations, letters, sketches, and items from eminent Victorians.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael takes the experts to Blackpool to dig up a program for the 1936 cup tie between Blackpool and Bolton - including Stanley Matthews - a rare salt-glazed mug, and an unusual medal. And Michael discovers the predecessor of his big red book.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel takes the experts to Newport in Gwent to examine a teapot that holds 144 cups of tea, an 18th-century mourning ring, a rare Hungarian vase, a large painting of Britannia, and the 'nicest netsuke seen on the roadshow.'

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts gather for an al fresco day in the gardens of Knebworth House in Hertfordshire. Featured items include a diamond brooch, a marine chronometer, a bronze Spirit of Ecstasy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Knebworth House in Hertfordshire, Michael introduces unseen finds from previous Roadshows and talks to Clive Farahar. Finds include a pair of female figures, an unusual table clock with a floating turtle, a chemist's mortar, and a Victorian toilet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Birmingham and find a Victorian painting, a telescope, an early 19th-century wooden ark, and a small pottery Turk's head, which turns out to be the most valuable piece of English pottery ever found at a Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts are at Cliveden in Buckinghamshire to examine a valuable collection of jewelry found in a rubbish tip, a Stanley Spencer sketch of the owner's father, a brooch, and a silver beaker. Michael also makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts return to Cliveden's gardens in Buckinghamshire and discover a ladies bureau, an 'eccentrically large' barometer, an unusual 'McMickey' Mouse, and a silver cruet set made by one of the great silversmiths, worth £30,000.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Curiosities lead to accusations of forgery.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the tusk of the narwhal and the spiral shells found on snails and ammonites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Beautifully patterned or brightly colored animals attract the attention of collectors.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Female Komodo dragons can reproduce without contact with a male; female aphids can clone themselves to produce copies.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Rhinos and hedgehogs protect themselves with body armor in the form of thick skin.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Animals adapt to life in the dark; owl eyes are too large to move within their sockets; the giant squid has the largest eyes in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on amazing animals; he looks at cuckoos and the way the death's-head hawkmoth steals honey.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most amazing animals; he takes a closer look at the vampire bat.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: How naturalists find out that some eels are electric is revealed.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on the wood frog, which freezes solid; he looks at how the emperor penguin breeds.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Nature produces two unique mechanisms of natural construction; weaving in birds and silk fascinate scientists.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough shines the spotlight on female hyenas; he examines why male seahorses give birth.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Examining how swallows appear each spring; Insects, such as butterflies, suddenly arrive in the summer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines how fleas jump; he tracks the true speed of a cheetah.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines orangutans and crows, two unusual animals that use tools.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick lands in the town that gave the world tequila and the metropolis that birthed mariachis and dishes like chilli con carne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits the Mexican capital to sample the Aztec cuisine.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein's latest travels take him to Mexico's culinary capital Oaxaca.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, a place once frequented by real pirates of the Caribbean, including Sir Francis Drake.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The series starts in autumnal Bordeaux. Rick arrives just in time to judge a local wine contest, and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein enjoys a winter break in Reykjavik in search of the perfect cod and sampling succulent fjord-reared roast lamb.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick enjoys a weekend in Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell enticingly side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall teems today with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Lorna and Stuart in Hereford are in a pickle; they've had three kids since they bought their house and have now well and truly outgrown it and now need Phil's help to sell it.

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: The rise of Buckingham Palace from swampland in just 300 years.

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Exploring Windsor Castle, the world's oldest and largest inhabited castle.

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse is the least-known but most romantic of the royal palaces.

programme.title: Castles: Britain's Fortified History
programme.desc: Sam Willis traces the history of the British castle from its first appearance in 1066.

programme.title: Castles: Britain's Fortified History
programme.desc: Sam Willis tells the story of the English ruler who left the most indelible mark on the castle -- the great Plantagenet king, Edward I who turned it into an instrument of colonization.

programme.title: Castles: Britain's Fortified History
programme.desc: Sam Willis explores how, by the Wars of the Roses, castles were under attack from a new threat -- the cannon, but survived into the Tudor era only to find their whole purpose challenged.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: Be transported back to 1862 when the building first came into royal hands; Nigel Havers reveals that it was Queen Victoria who snapped up the original Sandringham Hall as a 21st birthday present for her party-loving son Prince Bertie.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: The death of Edward VII in 1910 rocks Sandringham and the royals; the privately-owned house was inherited by Edward VII's wife, Alexandra; how the abdication crisis threw the very future of the house into question.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: A look at 1952, when tragedy struck as King George VI died in his sleep, discovering what happened as the new Queen began her reign.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Berkley Castle, Caerphilly Castle and Nottingham Castle all played a part in the fate of Edward II.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visits to Ludlow Castle in England and Wales' Carew and Pembroke castles.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visiting castles of the Loire Valley of France to relive the triumph and death of Joan of Arc.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Hugo de Burgh spends time as both master and prisoner of castles.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: During medieval times, castles served as the military headquarters dominating the surrounding countryside. These important strategic strongholds were built on high ground, surrounded by a deep moat and had heavily fortified walls.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visiting the Bran, Targoviste and Sangov castles of Vladd III, known as Vlad the Impaler.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: The fall of Chateau Gulliard; Caerphilly Castle is defeated by a con man.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: A look at castles where torture was the norm.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to Tatiana about a horrific tale of survival: From ages 6-25, her dad forced her to do drugs to sexually abuse her daily; he impregnated her 4 times & she had 3 of his children; he tortured her & beat her with a bat; he stabbed her twice.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El hijo de un suboficial es encontrado asesinado en su fiesta de “bienvenida a casa desde la prisión”. Las evidencias indican que el mejor amigo de toda la vida de Kasie, Dante Brown (Devale Ellis), es el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales para Danny cuando Luis Delgado, el sicario del cartel de la droga responsable de incendiar su casa, reaparece.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin y Frank se enfrentan sobre la nueva legislación de la oficina del fiscal que socava las políticas de Frank.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de policías siendo acosados por un grupo de personas en un complejo residencial, Frank ordena una redada para arrestar a cualquiera con una orden pendiente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS vincula una extraña escena del crimen en el Cementerio Nacional de Arlington con una serie de ataques contra veteranos sin hogar.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga a la cabo de la Marina Laney Alimonte (Camryn Grimes) después de que la evidencia sugiere que asesinó a su vecina mientras un hipnoterapeuta la trataba por insomnio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El hijo de un suboficial es encontrado asesinado en su fiesta de “bienvenida a casa desde la prisión”. Las evidencias indican que el mejor amigo de toda la vida de Kasie, Dante Brown (Devale Ellis), es el sospechoso.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/17/2019. Raised by a family with modest means in a childhood beset by tragedy, Nixon learned early to recognize opportunity where he could and how to seize it.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/19/2016. At the height of the Cold War, the CIA recruited a Soviet diplomat with the code name TRIGON to gain valuable intelligence from inside the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/26/2016. A Defense Intelligence Agency interrogator and U.S Special Forces work together to find missing Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/03/2016. The Joint Special Operations Command needed to stop violent AQI leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi and put an end to his reign of terror.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/10/2016. The FBI and Defense Intelligence Agency join forces to catch Ana Montes, a senior DIA analyst who was passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/19/2016. At the height of the Cold War, the CIA recruited a Soviet diplomat with the code name TRIGON to gain valuable intelligence from inside the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy

programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/24/2019. In a devastating defeat, Nixon lost one of the closest presidential elections in US history to JFK. In 1968, Nixon sensed an opportunity for a comeback.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 04/07/2019. After a great political comeback, Nixon realized his survival hinged on a key promise: to end the Vietnam War. The president suspects a conspiracy against him.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2019. Nixon was re-elected in a landslide, but shortly into his second term, the cover-up of a DNC Headquarters break-in at the Watergate complex began to fall apart.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/17/2019. Raised by a family with modest means in a childhood beset by tragedy, Nixon learned early to recognize opportunity where he could and how to seize it.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicycle chase leads to a bizarre reunion between an officer and suspect, police respond to a domestic dispute, and officers respond to a suspicious vehicle in a local park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disturbed naked man is spotted in a park covered in blood. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Watching football turns a couple against each other, a cop gets fed up with a repeat shoplifter, and a man tries to swallow a bag of marijuana before officers find it.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr. Raymond Langston, to gain access to the killer and get a crack in the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is shocked and saddened when, after working with Dr. Raymond Langston on the Dick & Jane murders, Grissom announces that his time as a CSI has come to an end and offers Langston a permanent position on the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The first day on the job for Dr. Langston turns from bad to worse when a simple burglary case quickly overlaps with a complicated arson and homicide case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston is shocked when his former student is found murdered and becomes the focus of a CSI investigation into the world of Mexican wrestling.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nick's case of a deceased skydiver takes an interesting turn when Catherine discovers there may be a connection between the skydiver and a mysterious double murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy run into each other at a science fiction convention for one of their favorite classic television shows, they end up investigating the murder of one of their beloved actors.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisits one of the very first cases she worked as a CSI when the convicted felon in the murder claims the verdict was based on faulty evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An unexplained illness that is affecting random citizens of Las Vegas baffles the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante una cita,Stokes se da cuenta de que una obra de arte en una exhibición tiene partes del cuerpo en descomposición,lo que lleva a una investigación en toda regla.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El exalcalde de Las Vegas recibe un disparo en el Museo de la Mafia y el equipo de CSI se embarca en una lección de historia en busca de pistas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un helicóptero de evacuación médica secuestrado con el CSI Brody a bordo desaparece, todo el equipo está en la caza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una desconocida cerca de las extrañas atracciones de un espectáculo itinerante inspirado en el siglo XIX, el equipo investiga un elenco de personajes inusuales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI llega a un accidente automovilístico, encuentran tres víctimas y un cerebro humano que no pertenece a ninguna de las víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga tres asesinatos aparentemente no relacionados, descubren que alguien se está vengando por asesinatos de casos sin resolver que nunca se resolvieron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que un traficante fallecido también era un experto en balística, tienen que trabajar con el FBI para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa del Dr. Robbins descubre el cuerpo de un hombre muerto desnudo en su dormitorio principal, el equipo de CSI se hace muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Willows vuelve a trabajar con el FBI después de que ocurre un golpe profesional en un bufete de abogados que ella recomendó a su amiga.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se despide de Catherine Willows mientras toma una decisión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A nasty divorce gets even worse when the husband's mistress turns up dead and, as the body count increases, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investigates a case of revenge on a scorned ex-lover. A CSI's personal problems taint the investigation and Horatio is forced to fire them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a suspected carjacker is murdered, the CSIs learn that the victim may have been involved in drug smuggling off the shores of Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer suspected of killing young women and branding them with a 'Y' is caught and also identified as having the extra Y chromosome.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a probation officer, and Horatio learns that one of the suspects in the murder may be a son he didn’t know he had.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the apparent murder of a college girl, while Delko has mysterious sightings of the late Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a uno de los mayores enemigos del equipo de CSI, Horatio debe determinar cuál de los miembros de su equipo es sospechoso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Megan Donner regresa a la unidad de CSI a tiempo para trabajar en un accidente de avión en los Everglades. Descubren una víctima a ocho kilómetros del accidente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que los pescadores capturan a un tiburón tigre y descubren parte de un torso humano en su estómago, la evidencia lleva al equipo a sospechar de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se produce una violación y un asesinato en una playa de Miami, envían a Horatio y al equipo a investigar la mansión de la familia Hamilton.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor muere mientras desactiva una bomba, Horatio emprende una misión personal para encontrar al culpable. Megan se pregunta si ese caso no es demasiado íntimo para él.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un sacerdote es asesinado, Horatio y el equipo deben investigar. Una huella de labios en un vaso señala a un monaguillo de 12 años como el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de cinco años es asesinada en un restaurante/área de juegos que atiende a padres e hijos, y Horatio y el equipo deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo investigan el asesinato de un stripper encontrado muerto después de una fiesta sexual femenina. La evidencia sugiere que tuvo relaciones sexuales antes de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una familia es asesinada en su casa, Horatio y el equipo intentan encontrar al asesino con las pruebas dejadas en el lugar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres personas son asesinadas a tiros en el centro de Miami durante la hora pico y Horatio y el equipo deben atrapar al asesino rápidamente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran a una profesora de una universidad local colgada de un árbol después de ser torturada. Había sido torturada durante al menos cuatro horas antes de que la ahorcaran.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una niña no identificada cerca de un campo de rehabilitación muy estricto, Horatio y el equipo investigan su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar cuando encuentran a una prostituta muerta a puñaladas metida bajo una cama después de que se limpió el cuerpo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se revela que una red de laboratorios clandestinos está fabricando drogas mortales, Horatio y Speedle investigan la situación.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a test of faith, Mac Taylor assigns Detectives Danny Messer and Aiden Burn to one of the CSI team’s toughest cases yet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A Chinatown robbery goes south when one security guard is killed and the other mistakenly fires shots at a gas tank, burning two of the robbers alive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Panic ensues at the New York Mercantile Exchange when a briefcase is left behind, it is traced back to a stockbroker who mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a mounted New York City police officer is shot off his horse, Detective Mac Taylor and the team comb the city for suspects.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The electrocution of a young man on the third rail of the subway leads into the world of an extreme sport where taking risks is part of the game.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Competitive dog owners become the prime suspects in a murder investigation when Detective Mac Taylor examines the death of a dog trainer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in Van Cortland Park leads the CSI team to Tanglewood, home to a group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Epílogo (S6 Ep 1)
programme.desc: La vida de un miembro del equipo de CSI de Nueva York cambia para siempre de manera significativa después de un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Lista negra (Presentando al sepulturero) (S6 Ep 2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York está rastreando a un asesino cibernético que actualmente amenaza la vida de varios trabajadores de la salud.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El asesino de la soga (S6 Ep 3)
programme.desc: Esta semana, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York está buscando a un asesino en serie que tiene un sentido de orientación increíblemente letal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerte reconocida (S6 Ep 4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre ADN que contradice un caso de asesinato que antes era aparentemente sencillo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cicatrices de batalla (S6 Ep 5)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI de Nueva York para investigar el reciente asesinato de un bailarín de hip hop clandestino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Me sucedió a mí (S6 Ep 6)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ejecutivo de software, el equipo de CSI se expone al mundo oculto del sexo con alimentos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: A toda marcha (S6 Ep 7)
programme.desc: Un miembro del equipo de CSI de las Vegas, Ray Langston, llega a Nueva York para ayudar a Mac y a su equipo a intentar salvar a un rehén de una red de trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El nido del Cucú (S6 Ep 8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York reanuda su búsqueda del Asesino de la Brújula después de que un cuerpo cae del puente de la calle 59.

programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Reencuentro
programme.desc: Durante años, una mujer sufrió lo que parecían ser los efectos secundarios desagradables del litio, un medicamento recetado para tratar el trastorno bipolar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es encontrada muerta en su departamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer quien se ha conocido por sufrir de depresión aparentemente se quitó su propia vida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesino probablemente esperaba cubrir sus huellas escenificando la escena del crimen. Pero los investigadores descubrieron el intento casi de inmediato y recurrieron a la ciencia forense para saber qué sucedió esa noche realmente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En poco más de un mes, dos mujeres que han vivido en el mismo complejo de apartamentos fueron brutalmente asesinadas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un rico magnate inmobiliario desapareció, pareció ser un juego sucio. En su testamento, dejó instrucciones sobre lo que sucedería si moría en circunstancias violentas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1998, una actuación de asesinato misterioso en Maryland se convierte en una verdadera novela policíaca cuando se descubre el cuerpo gravemente quemado de Stephen Hricko en su habitación de hotel.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía obtiene una pista sobre una pareja que desapareció en el fin de semana del Día de los Caídos durante un robo en marcha. La evidencia que se encuentra resuelve el brutal crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how earthquakes and faults have shaped human history by bringing both life and death.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how rocks have influenced the architecture of the Mediterranean, from the pyramids of Egypt to the squares of ancient Greece.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Tracing the history of cave paintings.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart examines how the rocks beneath our feet played a crucial role in determining the beliefs of ancient civilisations.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: His ship repaired, Linx prepares to take off as the Doctor races to stop history changing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah return in the TARDIS to present-day London but are mystified when they find the city completely deserted.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Doctor plans to capture a dinosaur so that he can discover who is transporting them through time. But Mike Yates is in league with the enemy and is ordered to stop the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Doctor has captured a Tyrannosaurus Rex but the conspirators don't intend for it to remain captive for long. Sarah follows a lead but places herself in the hands of the enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Sarah awakens to discover that she is on a spaceship that left Earth months ago and is heading for a new world. The Doctor is framed for causing the return of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Sarah discovers that the spaceship passengers are all victims of a deception, but not all are willing to believe her story.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Dinosaurs are appearing all over London in a last effort to frighten people away as Professor Whitaker prepares to initiate 'Operation Golden Age'.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders
programme.desc: The Doctor receives a mysterious package from his old companion, Jo Grant.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders
programme.desc: Lupton, now under the control of a giant spider, steals the blue Metebelis crystal.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders
programme.desc: Following Lupton, Sarah is accidentally transported to Metebelis 3 where she is captured.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders
programme.desc: The Doctor is in a coma and Sarah is held prisoner in the spiders' larder.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders
programme.desc: Sarah makes a bargain with the Spider Queen and returns to Earth with the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders
programme.desc: The Doctor returns to Metebelis 3 where he must face the spider's ruler, the Great One.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot
programme.desc: UNIT are called in when top secret plans are stolen from high-security establishments.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot
programme.desc: Harry Sullivan is sent to infiltrate Think Tank to discover the truth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot
programme.desc: Sealed inside an underground bunker, Miss Winters issues her demands to the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot
programme.desc: The Doctor races to avert a nuclear holocaust. The robot takes Sarah hostage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: The survivors of Earth lie in hibernation but the Doctor finds there has been an intruder.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: The survivors of the human race start to awaken. But The Doctor is concerned...

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: Humankind faces total destruction. Can the Doctor defeat the Wirrn?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: Trapped by the Wirrn, The Doctor and his friends are forced into one last terrible gamble.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry, and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Time Lords send the Doctor, Sarah, and Harry to Skaro at a point in time shortly before the creation of the Daleks. The Doctor's mission is to destroy his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor finds that some of Davros's fellow Kaleds are unhappy with the development of the Daleks. Sarah is forced to load a Thal war rocket with radioactive explosives.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker. But Davros is one step ahead and prepares to take drastic action.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed by the Thals' rocket, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory. But then, the Daleks appear and a massacre begins.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pekingese who refuses to eat or drink; a Chihuahua who bites people; two chow mixes who share a home but won't play nice with each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.desc: Jeff accuses Alexis of attempting to murder him and reclaims his stock; Mark is hired as Alexis' bodyguard; Dex Dexter, the son of a board member, proposes he and Alexis form a business alliance.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Vietnam is the easternmost country of the Indochina peninsula. Around 10% of the world's species live here, with tropical jungles fit to burst with wildlife. But less than 50 years ago, things were very different.

programme.title: Scotland From The Sky
programme.desc: Presenter James Crawford reveals how planners and architects took to Scotland's skies after World War II and used the God's eye view in their mission to redesign towns and cities across the Central Belt.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Indochina's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Indochina is a peninsula of Southeast Asia comprising of Vietnam, Laos, Cambodia, Thailand, Burma, and the mainland territory of Malaysia. In this series we explore two of the areas wildlife jewels, Cambodia and Vietnam, both unique in their own way.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Radar explores a little-seen side to Fiji when he journeys into the remote highlands to visit the village where the last white man was eaten.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The vets get situated in their dormitory accommodations. Dr. Greg deliberately pairs them according to their differences. Vets need to learn to work with colleagues and clients different from themselves.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: The dry forest, which once covered the entire Pacific coast of Central America, now exists only as isolated "vestiges". In Costa Rica, however, it has been revived and even expanded thanks to the efforts of biologists and the local population.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom Hunt is in Thailand, where he meets Ru Anting with a unique ability which he discovered when he almost drowned as a child. The water from his nose squirted out of his eyes.

programme.title: New Life: Born to Run
programme.desc: In a land of dangers, plant-eating animals are always at risk, and never more so than at the time of their birth; out on the open they are vulnerable and there are few places to hide. But luckily some are born to run...

programme.title: Plastic: The Real Sea Monster
programme.desc: Plastic floats. This is where our story begins. Millions of tons of plastic enter the ocean every year; from rivers and shores, ships, and platforms. The world's scientists have studied the phenomenon and come to alarming conclusions.

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy
programme.desc: Over millions of years, nature has evolved to deal with the strongest storms on the planet. This episode looks at varying strategies used by plants and animals that live in the hurricane zone and how they cope with the annual onslaught.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: African rainforests are the oldest in the world. They are inhabited by some of the most legendary animals, such as gorillas, chimpanzees, and okapi.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina visits Thetford Estate where she's treated to amazing photographic opportunities for her personal calendar.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Radar travels to the country the locals call \\"The Rock\\" to find out how this country of only 1400 people actually functions as a nation, especially given that 20,000 Niueans live in New Zealand.

programme.title: People and Bats
programme.desc: Bats are under the spotlight after being pointed to be the cause of the Covid19 crisis. This new documentary approaches the impact of this often viewed as dangerous animals by many people.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Wildlife guide, Craig accompanies Kristina to one of the wildest places in Zimbabwe – Chitake Springs, aka, Ambush Alley. They get up close to a huge bull elephant and Kristina has her first- ever sighting of endangered wild dogs.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Te Radar heads off to a town right beneath a South American mountain glacier that is dealing with water worries that should make us all sit up and take notice and he uses his own body to test a new way to make drinking water safe.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Back on the banks of Lake Kariba, Kristina is hosted by the luxurious Bumi Hills Safari Lodge. She tracks lions with her guide Madison, witness elephants swimming and challenges Madison to a fishing bet.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage Odom's tour auditions get underway; Uncle Al tries to save the twins; Collette and East-O's turbulent past comes to a head.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The rivalry between Tal and Zo comes to a head; Davis meets Odalie's parents.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Kevin and Charity begin divorce proceedings, but the circumstances are exacerbated when Lady Mae learns the truth about Kevin; Grace and Darius's relationship reaches a stalemate.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The anniversary of Faith's death is at hand and Grace shows no sign of giving up her pursuit of Mac; Triumph Pastor Basie Skanks and Jacob receive bad news regarding Triumph Two's finances.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob makes Basie an offer to clear his debt and gain full control of Triumph II; Mac receives bad news from Skip Leonard, which puts him an explosive collision course with Grace.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and Mac's showdown sends shockwaves through the family; Jacob offers the Bishop an olive branch; Kevin makes a decision that leaves Charity reeling.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob and Kerissa establish their new ministry; Charity desperately tries to reach Kevin; Darius gets an offer that may take him out of Memphis, leaving Grace to wonder where she fits in his life.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: When Sophia and Zora are excluded from the upcoming debutante Cotillion, Lady Mae sets out to make things right; Grace is inspired by Basie's sermon; Charity reaches out to Carlton.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy lays low after his Mustang is riddled with bullets; tensions run high with Ghost and Jason; Tommy enlists LaKeisha to help with his business; Tasha confronts Ghost about Terry Silver.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Dre remains in federal custody; Jason instructs Tommy and Ghost to kidnap Alicia Jiminez; Tommy teaches LaKeisha the drug game; Tariq's business begins to flourish; Tasha has a business plan of her own.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha sparks a new flame; Ghost utilizes his resources in an attempt to kill Tommy; Tariq's in over his head with the Italians; Dre forms an unlikely alliance; Proctor hatches a plan to gain custody of his daughter.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha revisits old habits when she begins to recruit soldiers for her new empire; Tariq pulls a ruse on Vincent; Proctor warns Tommy about a snitch; Ghost plans to take care of the snitch on his own terms.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After being duped by Tariq, Vincent holds Tariq hostage; Ghost and Tommy call a temporary truce in order to face a common enemy; Tasha puts her differences to the side and turns to an unlikely ally for help.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.
